memoryArtifacts.headline: The History of the Chipman Name
memoryArtifacts.description: Taken from my grandfather Gardiner's Book of Remembrance.  No sources listed.  I've uploaded this mostly for the history of the Chipman name.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Richardson於1569年6月3日出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾斯坦登時，他的父親Thomas Richardson III26歲，母親Margaret Silverside23歲。他於1590年8月24日與Katherine Duxford在英國英格蘭賀特福爾維斯特米爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1633年1月8日在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾享年63歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾阿爾布瑞聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Richardson于1569年6月3日出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾斯坦登时，他的父亲Thomas Richardson III26岁，母亲Margaret Silverside23岁。他于1590年8月24日与Katherine Duxford在英国英格兰賀特福爾維斯特米爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1633年1月8日在英国賀特福爾維斯特米爾享年63岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾阿爾布瑞聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Richardson was born on 3 June 1569, in Standon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Richardson III, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Silverside, was 23. He married Katherine Duxford on 24 August 1590, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 8 January 1633, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Albury, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Richardson est né le 3 juin 1569, à Standon, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Richardson III, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Silverside, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Duxford le 24 août 1590, à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1633, à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Richardson am 3. Juni 1569 in Standon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Richardson III 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Silverside 23. Er hat am 24. August 1590 in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Katherine Duxford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Richardson è nato il il 3 giugno 1569 nel Standon, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Richardson III, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Silverside, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Duxford il 24 agosto 1590, nel Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 gennaio 1633, nel Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Church, Albury, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Richardsonが1569年6月3日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスタンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Richardson IIIは26歳，母Margaret Silversideは23歳であった。1590年8月24日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルでKatherine Duxfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1633年1月8日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルで63歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルブリースト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Richardson(이)가 1569년 6월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스탠던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Richardson III(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Silverside(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1590년 8월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 Katherine Duxford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1633년 1월 8일 영국 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 알버이 스트 마이'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.London St Helen Bishopsgate, London, Eng: St Helen Bishopsgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Richardson nasceu em 3 de junho de 1569, em Standon, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Richardson III, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Silverside, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Duxford em 24 de agosto de 1590, em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1633, em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary's Church, Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Helen Bishopsgate, London, Eng: ст хелен бишопсгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Richardson родился 3 июня 1569 г. в местности стандон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Richardson III было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Silverside, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Duxford 24 августа 1590 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 января 1633 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, албури, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Richardson nació el 3 de junio de 1569, en Standon, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Richardson III, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Silverside, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Katherine Duxford el 24 de agosto de 1590, en Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de enero de 1633, en Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary's Church, Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
